releaseNotes:
v0.21.2 — polish + reliability pass:

• The "Add bottle" button no longer covers the last row's controls — pharmacy techs scrolling fast can hit "Mark Pulled" or "−1" without misclicking.

• Daily expiration sweep on launch is now near-instant even after a long offline period (was visibly slow when 1000+ bottles needed flipping).

• Windows title bar, taskbar entry, and File Explorer Properties now correctly identify the app as "RxRescue" by Skybound Systems.

• Migration tool from v0.20 cloud-folder logs: files larger than 50 MB are now skipped with a clear notice instead of crashing the import.

Under the hood: removed a redundant license-status checker that was racing the canonical license check.
